test/features/auth/infrastructure/servic.patterns: mocktail usage, arrange-act-assert pattern, timeout validation

changes: updated overall project status from 'planned' to 'in_progress'
.auto-claude/specs/002-robust-authentica.impact: marks significant milestone in authentication implementation

patterns_discovered.testing: comprehensive unit testing with mocktail for dependency injection
patterns_discovered.test_organization: grouped by functionality (basic operations, mutex pattern, exponential backoff)
patterns_discovered.async_testing: proper async/await usage with timeout validation
patterns_discovered.error_handling: testing both retryable and non-retryable error scenarios
patterns_discovered.mutex_implementation: testing race condition prevention with concurrent refresh attempts
patterns_discovered.backoff_algorithm: exponential backoff timing validation with millisecond precision

gotchas_discovered.concurrent_refresh: preventing multiple simultaneous refresh attempts through mutex pattern
gotchas_discovered.retry_logic: distinguishing between retryable (network errors) and non-retryable (invalid credentials) errors
gotchas_discovered.timing_validation: ensuring backoff delays are correctly implemented with millisecond precision
gotchas_discovered.state_management: proper isRefreshing flag management during async operations
gotchas_discovered.exception_wrapping: ensuring unexpected errors are properly wrapped in AuthException
gotchas_discovered.stream_subscription: proper cleanup of stream listeners in tearDown

approach_outcome.methodology: TDD (Test-Driven Development) approach with comprehensive test coverage
approach_outcome.implementation_quality: high - detailed edge case testing, concurrent scenario testing, and timing validation
approach_outcome.test_coverage: exhaustive coverage including success scenarios, error scenarios, race conditions, and retry logic
approach_outcome.maintainability: well-structured test organization with clear groupings and descriptive test names
approach_outcome.validation: through timing assertions, mock verification, and state validation

recommendations.test_continuation: Consider adding integration tests for the full refresh workflow
recommendations.performance: Add performance benchmarks for refresh operations under load
recommendations.coverage: Consider code coverage analysis to ensure complete test coverage
recommendations.documentation: Add test documentation explaining the retry logic and mutex behavior
recommendations.maintenance: Regularly update tests when authentication logic changes
recommendations.edge_cases: Consider adding tests for extreme edge cases like very short token expiration windows
